revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

Ranging Mode (R-Mode) is a maritime positioning and timing system that uses radio infrastructure to transmit synchronised radio signals in frequency bands which are allocated to maritime usage. 

{{IALAFooter}}
